title: taraxacum maricum
intro: Taraxacum maricum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its smaller size and less bitter taste compared to the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum maricum include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as kidney stones, arthritis, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Taraxacum maricum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
